text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you practicing your local idol reactions?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yup, I need to work on it every day so it comes
out naturally!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Really? I think it's okay to just act like you
normally do.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Not good enough. I need to make this a habit so
it comes out without thinking, at a moment's
notice!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, making good habits never hurts. ☆ If your
habits change, so does your behavior. And if you
change your behavior, you can change your
destiny...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So the first thing to changing your habits is to
change your surroundings. That's the way of feng
shui!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do you have to bring every single thing back
to feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
(But wait... My surroundings... Like putting a
poster of Hokkaido sayings up in my room. Could
that help?)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you interested? Ready to begin your feng
shui journey? ☆

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
N-not one bit. I'm gonna change through good ol'
hard work and perseverance!
